ops.text: cc-steer-lab pyproject.toml declares cc-transcript as an editable path source ([tool.uv.sources], ../cc-transcript). The local checkout is repeatedly broken 13.0 WIP (TailState removed, mine->mine_signals), so any 'uv sync' in the lab silently re-installs the broken editable and breaks all lab MLX scoring at import (cc_steer.watcher.daemon -> cc_transcript.watch.TailState). Workaround each time: 'uv pip install --python .venv cc-transcript==12.1.1' (targeted, not sync) which leaves the cc_steer editable intact. Durable fix (owner's call, touches how cc-transcript is co-developed): drop the cc-transcript path source in the lab pyproject and pin the registry version, OR keep the sibling checkout on a working tag. Recurs across sessions (see [[cc-steer-ci-red-cctranscript-v10-drift]]).
